campaign.name: Validate - Promptware
campaign.geo: United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Australia

descriptions: Cut LLM inference costs automatically. Drop-in API gateway. No code changes needed.
Route each query to the cheapest model. Save 40-60% without touching your codebase.
Cut LLM bills by routing smarter, caching prompts, and compressing inputs. Join the beta.
Exploding LLM costs? Promptware is the API layer that optimizes every call automatically.

business_description: Drop-in API gateway that automatically reduces LLM inference costs through prompt compression, intelligent model routing, and prompt caching — no code changes required. Built for engineering and AI teams spending $10k or more per month on LLM APIs who need cost savings without rebuilding their stack. Plugs into your existing workflow in minutes and shows exactly where your money is going through a live cost analytics dashboard.
